Full-Service Pool Construction

Everything Your Backyard
Deserves

From initial design to final handover — a complete end-to-end service so you don't have to coordinate multiple contractors.

The ultimate in pool personalisation

Custom Concrete Pools

Concrete is the premium choice for inground pool construction — and for good reason. Unlike fibreglass pools that come in set shapes and sizes, a concrete pool can be built to any shape, depth, or configuration your backyard demands.

  • Any shape — freeform, geometric, or lap pools
  • Any depth: shallow play areas to deep diving zones
  • Built for narrow, sloped, or irregular blocks
  • Premium finishes: pebblecrete, render, mosaic tiles
  • Integrated benches, ledges & lounge areas
  • All structural and engineering requirements handled
Enquire About This Service

Where architecture meets water

Water Features

A well-designed water feature transforms a pool from a simple backyard addition into a statement piece. From sleek water walls and cascading spillways to natural-look rock falls, we build features that perfectly complement your design.

  • Water walls and infinity edge effects
  • Natural rock formations and waterfalls
  • Blade and sheet water spillways
  • Automated controls integrated with pool system
  • Custom LED lighting for night-time ambience
  • Colour-changing illumination options
Enquire About This Service

Premium finishes that frame your pool beautifully

Coping & Surrounds

The coping and surrounds are among the first things people notice. We source from Queensland's leading suppliers to offer an extensive range of premium materials that complement both your pool and your home's architecture.

  • Travertine — natural, cool underfoot, timeless look
  • Marble — ultimate luxury, elegant veining
  • Granite — durable, striking, premium appeal
  • Limestone — soft, warm tones, classic Queensland style
  • Porcelain — modern, low maintenance, fade resistant
  • Sandstone — natural Australian aesthetic
Enquire About This Service

Safety without compromise on style

Pool Fencing

Queensland has strict pool safety regulations, and rightly so. Our fencing solutions meet all QLD safety requirements while looking exceptional — whether you prefer the open view of frameless glass or the privacy of panel fencing.

  • Frameless glass — unobstructed views, sleek lines
  • Semi-frameless glass — elegant and great value
  • Aluminium panel fencing — durable, low maintenance
  • Custom gate and latch solutions
  • Full QLD Pool Safety compliance guaranteed
  • Council approval assistance included
Enquire About This Service

Bringing your old pool back to life

Pool Renovations

An ageing pool doesn't have to stay that way. We specialise in comprehensive renovations that can completely transform a tired, dated pool into something you're proud of — from cosmetic upgrades to full structural repairs.

  • New pebblecrete or tile interior finishes
  • Coping and surround replacement
  • Waterline tile replacement or upgrade
  • Addition of water features or spa
  • New fencing and updated surrounds
  • Equipment upgrades: pumps, filters, chlorinators
Enquire About This Service

Relaxation built right into your design

Integrated Spas

Adding an integrated spa creates the ultimate backyard retreat. Our spas flow seamlessly with your pool — sharing filtration where possible — making them both beautiful and practical year-round.

  • Seamless pool-to-spa design integration
  • Negative edge overflow options
  • Bench seating and hydrotherapy jets
  • Shared or independent heating systems
  • Lighting and water feature integration
  • Automated temperature controls
Enquire About This Service

Trusted Suppliers

Premium Materials from Industry Leaders

O'Sullivan's Pool Interiors

Premium pool finishes — pebbles, render, and interior coatings in a wide range of colours.

The Pool Tile Company

Extensive range of premium tiles, coping, and surround options for every style and budget.

Legend Pool Products

Pumps, filters, salt water chlorinators, and pool automation equipment.

Get Started Today

Tell Us About Your Pool Project

Whether you have a fully formed vision or just a vague idea, we'd love to hear about your project. We'll guide you through every option and create a design that exceeds your expectations.
